## What does this PR do?

Brief description of the changes.

## Related Issue

Fixes #(issue number) or references #(issue number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring / code quality
- [ ] Breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My code follows the project style guidelines
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally
- [ ] I have updated the documentation if needed
- [ ] No personal information or secrets are committed
- [ ] All scripts pass syntax validation (`bash -n` / `python3 -m py_compile`)
- [ ] New cron JSON files are valid (`python3 -c "import json; json.load(open('file.json'))"`)
- [ ] New SKILL.md files have proper YAML frontmatter

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or log output to help explain your changes.
